project_context.name: SSK Footcare Management System
project_context.description: Footwear Manufacturing Management System (ERP) for Indian SMB
project_context.aesthetic_direction: Industrial, precise, confident, Indian SMB-friendly, workshop-grade clarity, blueprint-inspired. Data-dense but highly legible.

patterns.grid_borders: Use border-collapse techniques. Containers should have crisp 1px borders. Dashboard widgets should look like technical panels.
patterns.dense_tables: Tables must be highly scannable with sticky headers. Use JetBrains Mono for SKUs, Prices, and Quantities. Zebra striping (bg-slate-50) for alternate rows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C27842] text-white font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-6 py-3 border-2 border-transparent hover:bg-[#A65D24] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-6 py-3 border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0F172A] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:-translate-x-0.5 transition-all active:shadow-none active:translate-y-0.5 active:translate-x-0.5

inputs.default: border-2 border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-slate-900 focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors
inputs.table_cell_input: border-0 border-b border-dashed border-slate-300 bg-transparent px-2 py-1 text-right focus:border-[#2563EB] font-mono w-full

cards.widget: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 p-5 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden
cards.kanban: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 p-4 shadow-sm hover:border-[#C27842] transition-colors cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing border-l-4 border-l-[#C27842]

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0F172A] text-slate-300 border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col
navigation.nav_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white transition-colors border-l-4 border-transparent hover:border-[#C27842]

badges.status: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

features: Left side: Solid white background, dense and crisp login form. Logo at top.
Role selector: Radio group (Admin, Manager, Production Staff, Sales) stylized as pill buttons.
Right side: Full height image of leather crafting with dark overlay.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Subgrid for KPIs.
features: Top bar: Global factory status (Date, Shift, Active Users).
KPI row: 4 widgets (Active POs, Pairs in WIP, Dispatched Today, Material Alerts).
Charts: Stage-wise WIP Funnel Chart (Cutting -> Fitting -> Pasting -> Finishing -> Packing).
Recent Orders Table: Highly dense, sortable.

style_master.layout: Split view: List on left (1/3), Details on right (2/3).
features: Details tab 1: Image Gallery & Specs.
Details tab 2: BOM (Bill of Materials) - table linking to Material Master.
Details tab 3: Costing Breakdown.
Filters: Category (Upper, Sole, Consumable, Hardware).
Columns: Code, Name, Unit (SqFt, Kg, Ltr, Pcs), Current Rate (INR), Last Updated, Action.
Inline editing for 'Current Rate' with audit trail.

costing_calculator.layout: Full-screen workspace, hidden sidebar to maximize width.
features: Header: Style selector, Base Size, Target Margin %.
Grid Sections: Expandable/collapsible sections for Upper Materials, Sole/Bottom, Accessories, Consumables, Labor, Overheads.
Footer (Sticky): Auto-calculated Total Cost, GST Add-on, Suggested Selling Price.
Visuals: 'Excel-like' grid with fixed headers. Formulas run in real-time.
Upload Zone: Large dashed dropzone area. 'Drag PO PDF/Excel here'.
AI Extraction: Progress bar -> Side-by-side view (Original Document on left, Extracted Data Form on right).
Line Items: Matrix input for Style/Color/Size.
Columns: Cutting, Fitting, Pasting, Finishing, Packing, Dispatched.
Cards: Show PO#, Style ID, Qty, Deadline. Owner avatar.
Interactions: Drag and drop between columns. Click to open modal to scan barcode/log qty completed.

login_bg.description: Cobbler fitting a shoe sole, representing craft and industry.

blueprint_texture.description: Architectural blueprint texture for empty states or specialized backgrounds.

interactions_and_motion.philosophy: Mechanical, snappy, precise. No slow fades. Instill confidence through immediate feedback.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Hard shadows offset (translate-x, translate-y), solid borders changing color to Brand Tan or Action Blue.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. High contrast mode default.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid='kebab-case-role'. Example: data-testid='po-upload-dropzone', data-testid='kanban-card-cutting'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all Shadcn components are stripped of their default 'Vercel-look' (soft shadows, high border-radius). Override them with rounded-none or rounded-sm, thick borders (border-2), and industrial shadows as defined in layout_and_spacing.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Keep the sizing consistent (weight='regular' or 'bold' for headers).
For the Costing Calculator, prioritize table performance. Use standard HTML tables with Tailwind for precise control over cell borders (resembling Excel). Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric inputs.
Implement the Kanban board using a reliable drag-and-drop library or simple state management if mock. Ensure the cards have the thick left border indicating status/priority.
When creating the sidebar, use the dark theme (#0F172A) to separate navigation from the bright, data-dense work area.
Always mock data with realistic Indian context (e.g., INR currency format ₹, Indian names, GST brackets 5%/12%/18%).
Ensure all interactive components have the data-testid attribute for QA automation.
